problem id: abba85ac
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10110001 -> 01111000
  01010011 -> 01001001
  00100100 -> 10010010
  10110111 -> 10111011
  00110001 -> 00111000
  10010010 -> 00001001
  00111100 -> 10011110
  00000011 -> 01100001

query: 10011101
predicted answer: 11101110
